title: Cobblemon: Enderscape Spawns
description: This datapack adds Cobblemon spawns to the Enderscape mod's new biomes and structures, and adds new spawns to the end.
body:
This datapack adds cobblemon spawns to the Enderscape mod's new biomes and structures, and adds some new spawns to the end.

NOTE: This pack DOES NOT add new Cobblemon models or animations. It only adds spawn files, spawning presets, and a biome tag for compatability with the Enderscape mod.

Full list of pokemon spawned can be found here:
[Cobblemon: Enderscape spawn spreadsheet](https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/1zavS7yUlALeB-5TO9clgY4eazoX0vUPvSrqqb8yCvI0/edit?usp=sharing)
